/**
 * Clean fixture: no rules should fire.
 */

import { execSync } from "node:child_process";
import { randomBytes } from "node:crypto";

export function safeExec(branch: string): Buffer {
  return execSync("git checkout " + JSON.stringify(branch));
}

export function safeToken(): string {
  return randomBytes(16).toString("hex");
}

export function fromPattern(pattern: string): RegExp {
  if (pattern.length > 300) throw new Error("pattern too long");
  return new RegExp(pattern);
}

export function narrowUnknown(input: unknown): { id: number } | null {
  if (typeof input === "object" && input !== null && "id" in input) {
    return input as { id: number };
  }
  return null;
}

const cfg: Record<string, unknown> = {};
export { cfg };
